summary.shape_sentence: Opening flush reversed into a strong morning trend-up, then flattened into afternoon distribution with a weak late pullback into the close.

goat.note: Opening flush reversal into the main morning trend leg from roughly 25225 to 25625.

red_circles.behavior: No visible red-circle labels in the provided RTH frame; bearish behavior appeared mainly as pullbacks after extension highs near 12:10, 14:35, and 15:40.

green_circles.behavior: No visible green-circle labels in the provided RTH frame; bullish pivots were visually clearest at the 09:33 LOD reclaim, 10:00 higher-low reset, and 13:25 flush recovery.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: No visible orange bank/castle icons in the frame; inferred supply around 25620-25640 was tested and mostly respected into the close.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: No visible blue bank/castle icons in the frame; inferred demand around 25530-25555 held after the early-PM flush and into the close.

time_markers.10am_blue: Recovering from the opening flush, building a higher-low base around 25325 before continuation.
time_markers.12pm_red: Near upper range around 25600-25625, shifting from trend-up into midday stall.
time_markers.2pm_green: Holding elevated consolidation around 25590-25610 before a marginal push to HOD.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed at 25553.75 after a late fade from the afternoon high, still strongly above the open.

takeaway: Bullish open-flush reversal trend day with the cleanest opportunity from the early LOD reclaim; afternoon became high-level distribution with a marginal HOD and late fade.
